explanations.1: We're creating a new directed graph object (think of it as a blank canvas) where arrows will point from one thing to another.
explanations.20: We're creating a connection (edge) between source1 and process1, then immediately adding it to the graph — we could also create the edge first and add it later, but this does both at once.
explanations.27: This takes the graph we built and exports it as a PNG image file that you can view and share.
